resources.string: HavenCore
HavenCore
HavenCore autonomy
Autonomy briefings, anomalies, reminders, and other agent-initiated notifications.
Notifications
HavenCore can wake your phone with autonomy briefings (dryer done, calendar reminders, anomalies). Requires a UnifiedPush distributor app — we recommend ntfy.
Setup help
Install ntfy from F-Droid, the Play Store, or https://ntfy.sh/app.
In ntfy, set your server URL (e.g. https://ntfy.example.com) or use https://ntfy.sh for testing.
In ntfy → Settings → battery → disable battery optimizations for the ntfy app. Samsung and other OEM devices aggressively kill background apps; ntfy must stay connected to receive pushes.
Optionally, do the same for HavenCore as belt-and-suspenders.
Come back here and toggle Enable notifications.
Selene wake word
Persistent notification shown while the wake-word foreground service is holding the microphone in wall-display mode.
Selene is listening
Tap to open Selene. Swipe Stop to release the microphone.
Stop
Wall-display mode

Turn this tablet into an always-listening room satellite. Starts a foreground microphone service that runs the local wake-word detector and, on detection, pops the chat screen in fullscreen over your launcher.
Enable wall-display mode
Drop the wake-word ONNX, melspectrogram.onnx, embedding_model.onnx, and silero_vad.onnx into app/src/main/assets/wakeword/ before flashing.
